use_cases: Display customer testimonials on landing pages to build trust and social proof
Showcase product reviews in a visually organized grid layout
Highlight customer feedback with animated card elements on scroll
Provide social proof section for SaaS products or services
Create a testimonials section with responsive design for various screen sizes
ai_summary: A responsive testimonials section component that displays customer quotes, names, roles, and images in a grid layout. Features staggered scroll-triggered fade-in animations using Framer Motion, with customizable title, subtitle, and multiple testimonial cards. Designed for use as a social proof or reviews section on landing pages, product sites, or service pages.
